microsoft-365.label: Microsoft 365 focus
microsoft-365.plan_line: Microsoft 365 for SharePoint, OneDrive, and Teams — where Microsoft-shop knowledge and decisions live.
microsoft-365.base_notes: Search and read Microsoft 365 via the ms-365-mcp-server (Microsoft Graph) in read-only mode: SharePoint sites and pages, OneDrive files, Teams messages and channels, and Outlook/Calendar when enabled. The Microsoft-shop equivalent of Notion/Confluence (docs) plus Slack (comms). Read-only — the server runs with --read-only (write operations disabled); discover content with search before fetching. Never post, edit, or delete.
